languages.text: "Я заинтригован{mf||а}, но займусь этим позже. Тайны Сектора Бионика подождут".

traits.locale_text: "Прямо сейчас я вполне здоро{mf|в|ва} и пол{mf|он|на} сил. Сектор Бионика подождет".

languages.text: "I am intrigued, but I will get to it later. The mysteries of the Sector Bionica can wait."
languages.original_text: "Я заинтригован{mf||а}, но займусь этим позже. Тайны Сектора Бионика подождут".

traits.locale_text: "I am intrigued, but I will get to it later. The mysteries of the Sector Bionica can wait."
"I am intrigued, but I will get to it later. The mysteries of the Sector Bionica can wait."
"I am intrigued, but I will get to it later. The mysteries of the Sector Bionica can wait."

languages.text: 「私は健康で、元気だ。セクター・ビオニカのことは後回しでいい」
languages.original_text: "I am as fit and healthy as can be. The Sector Bionica can wait."

languages.text: "İlgimi çekti ama buna daha sonra bakacağım. Sektör Biyonika'nın gizemleri bekleyebilir."
languages.original_text: "I am intrigued, but I will get to it later. The mysteries of the Sector Bionica can wait."

traits.locale_text: "İlgimi çekti ama buna daha sonra bakacağım. Sektör Biyonika'nın gizemleri bekleyebilir."

languages.text: “我很感兴趣，不过之后再说吧。仿生区的秘密可以暂且搁置。”
languages.original_text: "I am intrigued, but I will get to it later. The mysteries of the Sector Bionica can wait."

traits.locale_text: “我很感兴趣，不过之后再说吧。仿生区的秘密可以暂且搁置。”

languages.text: "Ich bin neugierig, aber dazu kommen wir später. Die Geheimnisse des Sektors Bionica können warten."
languages.original_text: "I am intrigued, but I will get to it later. The mysteries of the Sector Bionica can wait."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin neugierig, aber dazu kommen wir später. Die Geheimnisse des Sektors Bionica können warten."

languages.text: « Je suis {mf|intrigué|intriguée}, mais je m'en occuperai plus tard. Les mystères du secteur Bionica peuvent attendre. »
languages.original_text: "I am intrigued, but I will get to it later. The mysteries of the Sector Bionica can wait."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis {mf|intrigué|intriguée}, mais je m'en occuperai plus tard. Les mystères du secteur Bionica peuvent attendre. »

languages.text: «Me intriga, pero iré más tarde. Los misterios del Sector Bionica pueden esperar».
languages.original_text: "I am intrigued, but I will get to it later. The mysteries of the Sector Bionica can wait."

traits.locale_text: «Me intriga, pero iré más tarde. Los misterios del Sector Bionica pueden esperar».
